hero.title: Bruma Studio
hero.body: We build modern websites and digital experiences with the precision of code and a love for the craft.

credibilityStrip.heading: The Order
credibilityStrip.body1: Bruma Studio is a focused digital studio led by practitioners, not managers. We bring agency-level craft with the agility and attention of a dedicated team.
credibilityStrip.body2: Our stack is modern. Our standards are high. Every project receives the attention it deserves from start to finish.
credibilityStrip.techStack: Next.js · React · TypeScript · Sanity CMS · Tailwind CSS · Vercel

ctaStrip.heading: Ready to Begin?
ctaStrip.body: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your vision and we'll craft a plan to bring it to life.

meta.title: Services
meta.description: Web development, CMS solutions, and design strategy. We build with Next.js, Sanity CMS, and headless WordPress.

hero.label: The Arts
hero.heading: What We Practice
hero.body: We specialize in a focused set of disciplines — modern web development, content management systems, and design strategy. Every service is delivered with the same standard: hand-crafted, performance-first, and built to evolve.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.body: We listen first. Understand your goals, audience, and constraints. Every project begins with clarity.

design.title: Design
design.body: Wireframes, mockups, and prototypes in Figma. You see the vision before a single line of code is written.

development.title: Development
development.body: Clean, hand-crafted code. Regular check-ins and staging previews so you're never in the dark.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Launch, testing, and handoff. Documentation for your team. Optional ongoing support to keep things running.

cta.heading: Start a Conversation
cta.body: Tell us about your project and we'll take it from there.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.subtitle: The Core Discipline
webDev.body1: We build fast, accessible, custom websites and web applications — from marketing sites and landing pages to complex platforms and dashboards.
webDev.body2: Our stack is Next.js, React, and TypeScript, deployed on Vercel for speed and reliability. Every project is hand-crafted. We don't use page builders or drag-and-drop tools. The result is cleaner code, faster load times, and a site that scales with your business.

cms.title: CMS & Content Systems
cms.subtitle: The Living Architecture
cms.body1: A website is only as powerful as its content system. We build with Sanity CMS and headless WordPress — modern content platforms that give you full control over every page, post, and product without needing a developer for every update.
cms.body2: Headless CMS means your content is separate from your design. Update text, swap images, publish blog posts — all from an intuitive editing interface. We set it up so your team can manage it independently.

design.title: Design & Strategy
design.subtitle: The Blueprint
design.body1: Great development starts with great design and a clear plan. We offer UI/UX design, brand identity, and digital strategy as standalone services or as part of a full-build project.
design.body2: Whether you need a complete visual identity, a set of Figma mockups before development begins, or strategic guidance on your digital presence, we approach every project with intention and restraint.

meta.title: Portfolio
meta.description: Selected works and experiments from Bruma Studio. Web development, CMS solutions, and design projects built with Next.js, Sanity CMS, and modern tools.

hero.label: The Grimoire
hero.heading: Our Work
hero.body: Every project is a spell cast with intention — built from modern code, shaped by design, and delivered with craft.

meta.title: Blog
meta.description: Technical insights, build logs, and lessons from the craft. Notes from the workshop floor.

hero.label: The Scrolls
hero.heading: Codex
hero.body: Technical insights, build logs, and lessons from the craft. Notes from the workshop floor.

Scrolls.emptyState: The first scroll is being written. Check back soon.

meta.title: About
meta.description: A deliberately small studio. The people you talk to are the people who build your project.

hero.label: The Order
hero.heading: Who We Are
hero.body: A deliberately small studio. The people you talk to are the people who build your project.

origins.heading: Origins
origins.body1: Bruma Studio was founded on a simple conviction: the best digital work comes from small, focused teams who care deeply about craft.
origins.body2: We saw too many agencies selling process over product — layers of account managers, junior developers, and templated solutions dressed up as custom work. We built Bruma to be the opposite: a studio where every project gets direct attention from the people actually doing the work.
origins.body3: We're bilingual by nature, not by strategy. English and Spanish are both native to our team, which means we don't just translate — we think, design, and communicate fluently in both languages.
origins.body4: Based in Tijuana, we serve clients across the Americas and beyond. Small by design. Powerful by craft.

craft.title: Craft over speed.
craft.body: We'd rather take an extra week than ship something mediocre.

clarity.title: Clarity over cleverness.
clarity.body: The best code and the best copy are both easy to understand.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by nature.
bilingual.body: Two languages, two markets, one standard of quality.

small.title: Small by design.
small.body: Every client gets our full attention. No layers, no handoffs.

meta.title: Offerings
meta.description: Transparent scope for quality craft. Web development packages from landing pages to complex multi-language platforms.

hero.label: The Offerings
hero.heading: What We Offer
hero.body: Transparent scope for quality craft. Every project includes direct communication with the people actually building it.

howItWorks.heading: How Pricing Works
howItWorks.body: We price by project scope, not by hour. After an initial conversation, we provide a detailed proposal with a fixed price — no surprises, no scope creep. Every project includes source code ownership, staging environment for review, and post-launch support.

items.question: What if my project doesn't fit these tiers?
items.answer: These are starting points. We'll scope a custom proposal based on your specific needs after our first conversation.

items.question: Do you require a deposit?
items.answer: Yes — 30% upfront to begin, 30% at design approval, and 40% upon delivery. This protects both parties.

items.question: Can I start with The Parchment and upgrade later?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many clients begin with a focused launch and expand as their business grows. We build with scalability in mind.

items.question: Do you work with international clients?
items.answer: Yes. Most of our clients are in the US and Latin America. We communicate in English and Spanish and work across time zones.

items.question: What's your tech stack?
items.answer: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Sanity CMS, headless WordPress, and Vercel. Modern, fast, maintainable.

items.question: Do you do WordPress sites?
items.answer: We build headless WordPress sites where WordPress serves as the content backend and Next.js powers the frontend. We don't build traditional WordPress theme sites.

cta.heading: Ready to Discuss Your Project?
cta.body: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your vision and we'll craft a proposal.

meta.title: Our Process
meta.description: A proven four-phase process from discovery to delivery. Structured enough to keep things on track, flexible enough to adapt to your needs.

hero.label: The Ritual
hero.heading: How We Work
hero.body: Every project follows a proven process — structured enough to keep things on track, flexible enough to adapt to your needs.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.body: It starts with listening. We schedule a discovery call to understand your business, your audience, your goals, and your constraints. No questionnaire templates — a real conversation.

design.title: Design
design.body: We design in Figma, starting with wireframes and progressing to full-fidelity mockups. You review and approve the visual direction before development begins. No surprises.

development.title: Development
development.body: Clean, hand-crafted code. We build in Next.js with TypeScript and deploy to a staging environment where you can review progress in real time. We check in regularly — you're never left wondering what's happening.

delivery.title: Delivery & Beyond
delivery.body: Launch day. We handle deployment, DNS, SSL, and everything technical. We train your team on the CMS and hand over complete documentation. Then we stick around.

cta.heading: Ready to Begin?
cta.body: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your vision and we'll craft a plan to bring it to life.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Start a project with Bruma Studio. Web development and design for businesses in English and Spanish.

hero.label: Summon
hero.heading: Let's Begin
hero.body: Every great project starts with a conversation. Tell us about your vision and we'll take it from there.

ContactForm.successBody: We'll be in touch within 24 hours. Thank you for reaching out.

Newsletter.title: The Signal
Newsletter.body: Technical insights, project stories, and the occasional arcane discovery. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
Newsletter.successBody: Welcome to The Signal. You'll hear from us soon.

Metadata.titleDefault: Bruma Studio — Dark arts of digital craft
Metadata.description: Bruma Studio is a bilingual digital studio specializing in Next.js, Sanity CMS, and modern web development. Custom websites built with craft and intention.
Metadata.ogDescription: Bilingual digital studio specializing in Next.js, Sanity CMS, and modern web development.

web-development.title: Web Development
web-development.subtitle: The Core Discipline
web-development.description: Custom websites and web applications built with modern frameworks. Fast, accessible, and designed to scale with your business.

cms-content-architecture.title: CMS & Content Architecture
cms-content-architecture.subtitle: Structured Knowledge
cms-content-architecture.description: Content management systems that give your team full control. Structured, flexible, and built for how you actually work.

ui-ux-design.title: UI/UX Design
ui-ux-design.subtitle: Visual Alchemy
ui-ux-design.description: Interfaces that look exceptional and work intuitively. From design systems to full product design, every pixel serves a purpose.

obsidian-commerce.title: Obsidian Commerce
obsidian-commerce.description: A headless e-commerce platform for a luxury candle brand, featuring immersive product storytelling and a seamless bilingual checkout experience.

arcana-dashboard.title: Arcana Dashboard
arcana-dashboard.description: An internal analytics dashboard for a fintech startup, transforming complex financial data into clear, actionable visualizations.

verdant-press.title: Verdant Press
verdant-press.description: A content-managed editorial platform for an independent publisher, built for speed, accessibility, and beautiful long-form reading.

conrado-bojorquez.bio: Founder of Bruma Studio, bringing premium digital craft to businesses that value atmosphere and precision in equal measure. With 10+ years of experience in digital marketing related roles like design, web development and project management.

oscar-mercado.bio: Connects the studio with clients who value quality digital craft, leading business development, partnerships, and client relationships. Focused on aligning what Bruma builds with what businesses need to grow, ensuring every collaboration is a strong strategic fit.

aracely-rivera.bio: Keeps the studio running smoothly by managing project timelines, client communications, and day-to-day logistics that turn ambitious ideas into delivered work—ensuring every project stays on track from kickoff to launch.
